steps.title: Match the singular subject
steps.content: The subject is the country's name, a singular noun phrase. The verb must agree with that singular subject and describe a general pronunciation fact.

steps.title: Test the verb forms
steps.content: Choice B, Choice C, and Choice D are all plural forms, so they do not agree with the singular subject name. The simple present singular verb fits both the subject and the statement of a standing fact. The answer is A.
